scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p node_modules/@johnlindquist/kit node_modules/@scriptkit/sdk && ln -sf ../../../scripts/kit-sdk.ts node_modules/@johnlindquist/kit/index.ts && ln -sf ../../../scripts/kit-sdk.ts node_modules/@scriptkit/sdk/index.ts && echo '{"name":"@johnlindquist/kit","version":"999.0.0-local","main":"./index.ts","types":"./index.ts"}' > node_modules/@johnlindquist/kit/package.json && echo '{"name":"@scriptkit/sdk","version":"999.0.0-local","main":"./index.ts","types":"./index.ts"}' > node_modules/@scriptkit/sdk/package.json
scripts.storybook:all: npm run storybook:capture && npm run storybook:components
scripts.storybook:dev: echo Tier 2: Run cargo run --bin storybook
